name: default
description: Machine-readable sibling of the feature-explainer: a topic, an overview TL;DR, a sections array (heading, body), and an optional code array (caption, body). Placeholder strings keep the file parseable; the agent expands each single template element into one entry per section/code block.

slots.description: Short summary of what the feature does and how it flows.
Section heading. The sections array (see shape) carries one example element to clone per section.
Code block caption, e.g. a file path or label. The code array (see shape) carries one example element to clone per block.
